name: ar5iv-vscode
description: Live ar5iv preview for LaTeX documents in VS Code.

ar5iv.conversionMode.description: Conversion mode. Auto starts the managed local backend by default, with native and executable modes available for explicit testing.

ar5iv.backendUrl.description: Base URL for hosted conversion when the managed local server is disabled.

ar5iv.managedServer.enabled.description: Start and stop a bundled local ar5iv-editor server for desktop backend conversion.

ar5iv.serverPath.description: Absolute path to an ar5iv-editor server binary. Empty means use the downloaded binary (or a development target path when running from source).

ar5iv.serverDownload.description: Automatically download the ar5iv-editor conversion backend on first use when no local binary is configured. Cached in the extension's global storage.

ar5iv.serverDownloadBaseUrl.description: Override the base URL the backend is downloaded from (for forks or local mirrors). Empty uses the official ar5iv-editor GitHub releases.

ar5iv.nativeLatexmlOxidePath.description: Absolute path to a native latexml-oxide module. Empty means bundled or extension-managed.

ar5iv.disableNativeLatexmlOxide.description: Disable the native converter and use the next allowed conversion mode.

ar5iv.latexmlOxidePath.description: Absolute path to a latexml-oxide executable fallback.

ar5iv.debounceMs.description: Delay after edits before refreshing the preview.

ar5iv.demoSampleOnStartup.description: On activation with no editor open, open a sample LaTeX document with the preview beside it. Enabled for the hosted /vscode web demo; off for normal use.

scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:web && npm run build:preview
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p media && cp ../frontend/public/css/ar5iv.css media/ar5iv.css && cp ../frontend/public/css/ar5iv-fonts.css media/ar5iv-fonts.css
scripts.build:server: cargo build --release -p ar5iv-editor-server && mkdir -p bin && cp ../target/release/ar5iv-editor bin/ar5iv-editor
scripts.build:all: npm run build:server && npm run build
scripts.package:vsix: npm run build && vsce package --out ar5iv-vscode.vsix
